raw: {"plans":[[[3],[3],[3],[3],[3]],[[3],[3],[3],[1],[1]],[[1],[3],[3],[3],[1]]],"rationale":"The active 1-block appears parked at the far lower-right edge on the long 9 floor. The nearest meaningful structure is leftward, so the primary maneuver is to keep moving left; alternates add an up/jump action after gaining horizontal position in case the next progress gate requires climbing or hopping onto the lower platform."}
